Question ID: architecture-derived-B6-binary-representation-minimization
Title: B6. Binary Representation Minimization

Problem:
For each n, let k(n) be the number of ones in the binary representation of 2023*n.
Find the minimum k(n).

Grading target:
Exact numerical match.

Node started: Let w(x) denote the Hamming weight of x, defined as the number of set bits in the binary representation of x, such that w(x) = sum_{i=0}^{floor(log2(x))} ((x >> i) & 1) for x in Z+. Let S = {n | n is in Z+}. Find min {w(2023 * n) | n in S}.
